_meta.title: Control registry -- mutation-test apparatus for the company's controls
_meta.doctrine: A control that CANNOT FAIL is worse than no control. For every control, inject the exact defect it exists to catch; it MUST fire. Audit for three killer patterns: TAUTOLOGY (checked value derived from the same source it is checked against), FAIL-OPEN (passes on missing/zero/empty/malformed), FAIL-SILENT (passes when the checker itself is unavailable).
_meta.coverage_note: Pass 1 (commit e16f00de) mutation-tested the highest-tier / customer-impacting control set (invariant library, Tier-1 pre-bill gate, obligations tiering, the Qwen backstop, the epistemic verifier). Pass 2 (H12 L2->L3) extends to the inventoried-but-untested tail: the compliance trackers (population sanity, consumer duty, social obligation, crisis bad debt, green claims), the health / page-consistency gates (R14 basis labels, dashboard consistency + population consistency, background/health_check), the daemon change-detection (dedup) gate, and a STRUCTURAL check of the LLM-judge evaluators (judgement layer itself remains not-deterministically-mutation-testable, documented not counted as covered).

TAUTOLOGY.detail: check_vat (THEATRE, mitigated); social_obligation is_compliant status-trust (GAP KL-6, mitigated by independent underspend_records)

FAIL_OPEN.detail: pre_bill subtotal<=0 (FIXED pass 1); green_claims zero-obligation (GAP KL-7); dashboard _check_consistency per-key skip (GAP KL-8)

FAIL_SILENT.detail: Qwen backstop unavailable (FIXED pass 1); population estimated-read empty-log (GAP KL-4); consumer_duty empty-register=GREEN (GAP KL-5); dashboard _check_consistency no-insights (GAP KL-8)

cumulative_counts.honest_note: Pass 2 fixed ZERO controls: unlike pass 1's two isolated single-caller fixes, every gap found is a semantics change across multiple callers (consumer_duty.overall_rag has 14+ callers; check_estimated_read_rate feeds sanity_daemon), so per SELF_INTERRUPT_DISCIPLINE (QUEUE-by-default) they are registered as ranked kill-list entries for the orchestrator, not fixed on sight. Every pass-2 control still FIRES on its core named defect; the gaps are secondary fail-open/fail-silent branches, so pass-2 theatre count is 0.

controls.catches: An exact rate (e.g. VAT 5% resi / 20% SME) charged at the wrong value.
controls.mutation: Pass a rate outside +/- tolerance of the anchored value.

controls.catches: A value (standing charge, non-commodity cost, TDCV band, margin, bad-debt) outside its plausible [low,high] envelope.
controls.mutation: Pass low-epsilon and high+epsilon; both must be rejected. Applied as a sweep across every RangeInvariant in ALL_INVARIANTS.

controls.catches: A year-specific unit rate wildly off its anchored Ofgem cap band (order-of-magnitude / wrong-year error).
controls.mutation: Pass 10x the anchor for an in-band year.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: check() returns True for any year < min(by_year) (pre-2019, before the Ofgem cap existed). This is a DELIBERATE, sourced limitation (no valid anchor pre-dates the cap; extrapolating backwards produced real false positives on genuine competitive-market pricing, Phase 5) -- not an accidental fail-open. Documented, retained, listed not fixed.

controls.catches: NAMED defect: the SME-as-Household VAT MISLABEL (C6 / R10 class). Actually catches only: a VAT rate inconsistent with the bill's OWN declared segment label.
controls.mutation: Mislabel an SME as resi with VAT self-consistently computed at 5%.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Derives the expected rate from `segment` and checks it against a VAT figure the generator also derived from `segment` (vat = subtotal * vat_rate(segment)). Both sides are the same function of the same label, so it passes every bill and structurally CANNOT catch a mislabel -- the exact defect it is named for. This is the flagship tautology the red-team found.
controls.mitigated_by: check_vat_consistent_with_consumption (independent cross-check on metered load) -- FIRES on the mislabel. check_vat is retained as honest defence-in-depth against the narrower rate-vs-declared-label defect, documented as a tautology in-code.

controls.catches: The SME-as-Household mislabel, via a signal INDEPENDENT of the label: an I&C-scale metered load billed at the domestic 5% rate.
controls.mutation: I&C-scale kWh (>domestic ceiling) with a 5% rate applied.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Honestly one-directional: low consumption never refutes a business label (a real microbusiness consumes domestic volumes). The True-on-no-signal branch is a documented signal-strength boundary, not a fail-open -- it is the non-flaggable direction by design.

controls.catches: A resi bill whose per-period consumption is implausible (order-of-magnitude error, SME-scale load on a resi record).
controls.mutation: 50,000 kWh over ~30 days on a resi account.

controls.catches: A catch-up bill breaching the SLC 21BA 12-month window whose excess was NOT written off (silently charged in full), or a token write-off against a large breach.
controls.mutation: A 4-year, GBP 5,000 undercharge catch-up with catchup_written_off_gbp = 0.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Independently re-derives the write-off via BackBillingAssessment (does not trust the bill's own cap-applied flag). Returns False (HELD) on missing/unrecognised direction, missing period fields, and malformed date strings -- fails CLOSED on data it cannot verify. Hardened by a prior same-session red-team.

controls.catches: The ledger's recognised billed revenue diverging from the sum of actually-issued (gate-passing) bills -- revenue recognised for HELD/unissued bills.
controls.mutation: total_billed_gbp that does not equal the sum of issued bill amounts.

controls.catches: Tier-1 preventive gate: any bill failing VAT-by-segment, resi consumption plausibility, or the back-billing cap is HELD, never issued.
controls.mutation: A mislabelled SME-as-resi bill (via the consumption cross-check) and a non-positive-subtotal-with-VAT bill.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: _actual_vat_rate() returns None when subtotal <= 0, which PREVIOUSLY skipped BOTH VAT checks silently -- a zero/negative-subtotal bill passed the gate with no VAT validation. FIXED: negative subtotal and any VAT charged on a non-positive subtotal now fail CLOSED (HELD). A legitimately-empty zero/zero bill still passes the VAT guard.

controls.catches: A rendered bill whose usage line does not equal printed closing minus printed opening meter reads (the 331.1-vs-331.2 rounding-compound defect).
controls.mutation: billed usage that disagrees with closing-minus-opening at 1dp.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Returns True when any of the three reads is None (a bill carrying no meter reads -- genuinely not applicable). This is scoped correctly: it is a reads-reconciliation control and a bill with no reads has nothing to reconcile. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: Absurdities a human auditor would catch but no automated invariant was written for yet (the motivating SME-as-Household case).
controls.mutation: call_qwen returning '' (Ollama down) -- the checker itself unavailable.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: PREVIOUSLY returned verdict 'clean' on an empty/unparseable response, so on every autonomous run where Ollama was down the audit passed by NOT RUNNING. FIXED: a third verdict state 'unavailable' now ALARMS -- run_internal_audit / run_phase_close_audit emit a kind='checker_unavailable' finding so the caller reports the outage instead of logging 0 flagged. Still fabricates no per-bill finding.

controls.catches: Mis-tiering a customer-impacting obligation below Tier 1 (which would drop it out of the 100%-continuous preventive-gate treatment).
controls.mutation: Assert a CUSTOMER_FINANCIAL+HIGH obligation (vat_by_segment) and a PHYSICAL_HARM+LOW obligation (PSR) both resolve to TIER_1.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: This is a pure classifier, not a fire/not-fire defect-catcher. Mutation-tested for correct tiering; a downgrade in the mapping would misroute an obligation. obligations_without_a_tracker() honestly surfaces uncovered obligations (existing_tracker=None) rather than papering over them.

controls.catches: Company-layer code importing SIM internals directly (bypassing the company/interfaces/sim_interface.py seam) -- an epistemic-wall violation.
controls.mutation: A company/ file containing `from simulation.foo import bar`.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires reliably on the literal forbidden-import syntax. Two coverage limitations, low severity, LISTED not fixed: (1) _scan_file returns [] on FileNotFoundError (a missing file reads as clean); (2) only line-start import syntax is matched -- an importlib/getattr dynamic bypass is not caught. These are detection-coverage gaps, not a fail-open on the syntax it owns.

controls.catches: A resi customer's summed annual consumption implausible against the TDCV-derived envelope (population version of the R10 C6 class).
controls.mutation: 50,000 kWh/yr resi annual total over a full year (days >= 60).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: A partial-year (< _MIN_DAYS_COVERAGE_FOR_ANNUAL_CHECK=60 days) joiner/leaver is SKIPPED, not flagged low -- a scoped, sourced guard (SANITY_TRIAGE_2026_07_11, C1_2's 2-day stub), asserted in test not hidden. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: A resi customer's average unit rate drifting off the real Ofgem-cap band for its year (a pricing bug applying a stale/wrong-year rate).
controls.mutation: ~16x the anchored GBP/MWh for an in-band year.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: kwh<=0 rows are skipped (no division possible) -- scoped guard, not a fail-open.

controls.catches: The read-generation mechanism broken (whole population ~0% or ~100% estimated).
controls.mutation: 100% estimated reads -> outside the [2%,85%] sanity band.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on 0%/100%, but an EMPTY meter_read_log (arguably the most-broken state -- no reads produced at all) returns [] (clean). NOT fixed: an empty log can be a legitimate first-run and sanity_daemon.py consumes this, so alarm-on-empty needs caller analysis. Registered KL-4.

controls.catches: The payment-channel archetype mechanism broken (everyone landing on one method).
controls.mutation: 100% direct-debit -> outside the [55%,90%] band around the DESNZ 72-75% anchor.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: total==0 (no DD/SC records) returns [] -- genuinely no data to judge. Scoped guard.

controls.catches: A RED Consumer-Duty outcome must escalate the whole register to RED.
controls.mutation: One RED outcome amongst GREENs.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires correctly on a RED outcome, but an EMPTY register (zero assessments ever performed) reports GREEN -- under FCA Consumer Duty 'no assessment done' is a governance failure, not compliant. NOT fixed: overall_rag has 14+ callers treating GREEN as baseline; semantics change needs orchestration. Registered KL-5.

controls.catches: A mandatory social-spend obligation underperforming / underspent against target.
controls.mutation: An UNDERPERFORMING obligation, and a grossly-underspent obligation mislabelled PAID.
controls.killer_pattern_audit: TAUTOLOGY (GAP KL-6, mitigated by independent control)
controls.killer_pattern_detail: non_compliant() trusts the self-declared `status` field -- a mislabelled-PAID underspend passes it (the same 'compliance from a declared label' pattern as the VAT tautology). underspend_records() is the INDEPENDENT spend-vs-target control that DOES fire on it. is_compliant() alone is theatre for the underspend defect; the independent control mitigates. Registered KL-6.

controls.catches: A bad-debt trajectory with NO real 2021-22 crisis step-up (the CFO cold-walk finding).
controls.mutation: A flat ~2%-of-revenue trajectory (fires); a genuine step-up (passes); missing crisis-year data (fails closed).
controls.killer_pattern_detail: R12 anti-goal-seek diagnostic: EXPECTED to fail against current output. Fires on flat/no-step-up, passes on a real >=1.2x step-up, and fails CLOSED (passed=False) when no crisis-year data is present -- an absent input never reads as a pass.

controls.catches: Green marketing claims not backed by held REGOs (Fuel Mix Disclosure Regs 2005) -> NON_COMPLIANT + shortfall + penalty.
controls.mutation: Claim 10 MWh green supply, hold only 5 MWh.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on a genuine shortfall, but obligation_mwh==0 short-circuits to 100% COMPLIANT -- if green-product DETECTION silently breaks (active_green_codes empty though green tariffs sell), the audit reads compliant. Zero obligation legitimately means 'no claims made', so NOT fixed; registered KL-7 as a watched surface. Independence OK (held REGOs are a separate real asset from consumption -- not a tautology).

controls.catches: Same-page surfaces disagreeing -- exec-summary insights vs the run-output totals (net/gross margin, EV, bills, committee, retention, churn).
controls.mutation: insights net_margin != portfolio net_margin beyond tolerance.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fires on a real surface disagreement, but (a) a missing/empty run_insights.json returns True (pass) -- same class as the R11 orphan-transition incident (gate passes when its comparison input is absent); (b) a headline key missing on one side is silently skipped (per-key fail-open). Same graceful-degrade shape as _check_bridge_reconciles's documented missing-file branch. NOT fixed (first-run insights may legitimately be absent); registered KL-8.

controls.catches: R14: a published headline GBP figure (net margin, enterprise value) lacking a complete basis label (clock/provisional/note).
controls.mutation: net_margin_gbp present with an empty basis map.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Scoped correctly: a key with no published figure needs no basis (skip); a PRESENT figure with an incomplete basis entry fails CLOSED. Not a fail-open on the defect it owns.

controls.catches: Two different populations rendered on one page as 'accounts/households' (R10 class, defect 2/3): pulse-strip Book Size not reconciling to the final-year active_customer_ids population.
controls.mutation: book_annual last-entry legs != len(final-year active_customer_ids).

controls.catches: An expected background daemon not running -> DEGRADED + NTFY.
controls.mutation: One EXPECTED_PANES daemon absent from both tmux and ps.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: FAIL-SILENT audit PASSED: if tmux AND ps both fail (return empty), the checker is effectively unavailable and it ALARMS (every daemon reads NOT RUNNING -> DEGRADED), never reads clean. Alarm-on-absence, the correct behaviour.

controls.catches: R2/R3 committed-!=-running: a daemon process started before its own script's last modification (running stale code).
controls.mutation: A process 'started' in 2000 against a freshly-checked-out script.

controls.catches: Re-processing an identical run (dedup) -- and, critically, must NOT skip a run whose business surfaces genuinely changed (R11 orphan-transition class).
controls.mutation: A net-margin change must flip the fingerprint; a corrupt last-fingerprint file must not manufacture a skip.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: Fingerprint is sensitive to meaningful change (net margin) and to administration_event. FAIL-CLOSED audit PASSED: _read_last_fingerprint returns None on corrupt/missing file so the run is PROCESSED, never silently skipped by a spurious match. The near-identical-figures fail-silent class (R11) is separately mitigated by FORCE_REPUBLISH_FLAG + source_git_hash in the fingerprint.

controls.catches: STRUCTURAL only: a judge must not be able to 'fix' its way to a PASS -- its agent definition must grant no Write/Edit/NotebookEdit tools.
controls.mutation: Assert the tools: frontmatter contains no write/edit tools.
controls.killer_pattern_detail: The verdict QUALITY of an LLM judge cannot be deterministically mutation-tested (no fixed prompt->NEEDS_WORK oracle). Only the read-only structural guarantee is asserted. Documented as NOT-mutation-testable for its judgement, NOT counted as covered for that layer.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Empty meter_read_log returns [] (clean) though a total absence of reads is the most-broken read-generation state.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: listed, not fixed -- empty can be a legitimate first-run; sanity_daemon.py consumer needs analysis before alarm-on-empty is safe.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: Have the population runner pass an expected-nonzero flag, or alarm when reads are expected for the window but the log is empty.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: An empty register (zero outcome assessments) reports GREEN; under FCA Consumer Duty an un-assessed outcome is a governance failure, not compliant.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: listed, not fixed -- overall_rag has 14+ callers treating GREEN as baseline.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: Add an explicit UNKNOWN/UN-ASSESSED state (or a has_assessments() precondition on the board surfaces) rather than defaulting empty to GREEN.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Compliance derived from the self-declared status field, not the independent spend-vs-target evidence; a mislabelled-PAID underspend passes non_compliant().
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: listed, mitigated -- underspend_records() is the independent control that fires on it.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: Make non_compliant() also fold in is_underspend (independent evidence), not status alone.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: obligation_mwh==0 short-circuits to 100% COMPLIANT; if green-product detection silently breaks, a company selling green tariffs reads compliant.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: listed, not fixed -- zero obligation legitimately means no claims made.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: Cross-check obligation==0 against whether any active green product HAD billed consumption; flag the divergence.

newly_found_gaps_pass_2.gap: Missing/empty run_insights.json returns True (pass); a headline key missing on one side is silently skipped.
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.disposition: listed, not fixed -- first-run insights may legitimately be absent (same graceful-degrade shape as _check_bridge_reconciles).
newly_found_gaps_pass_2.fix_recommendation: Treat an ABSENT insights file as a hard gate failure once the pipeline guarantees it is always produced; count a one-sided missing headline key as a mismatch.

inventoried_not_yet_mutation_tested.note: STRUCTURAL read-only guarantee now asserted (llm_judge_evaluators_structural); the LLM verdict QUALITY itself remains not-deterministically-mutation-testable -- graded by prompt+model, no fixed prompt->NEEDS_WORK oracle. Documented, NOT counted as covered for the judgement layer.

The change-detection (dedup) gate and health-check are now mutation-tested; the sanity/session/deadman daemons' own SCHEDULING loops (cadence, cooldown, restart backoff) are not individually mutation-tested this pass.

examples: company/regulatory/* (50+ registers: ROC, REGO, CfD levy, price cap, GSOP, ombudsman, etc.)
inventoried_not_yet_mutation_tested.note: The highest-signal compliance trackers are now covered; the long tail of regulatory ledger/register modules is inventoried, not individually mutation-tested. Most are accumulator/reporting registers rather than fire/not-fire gates.
